raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja tee Sihrexi stipraki
buhs ne ka es/ tad nahz tu man
par Paligu/ bet ja tee Ammona
Behrni stipraki buhs ne ka tu/
tad nahfschn es tew par Paligu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Turrajs stipri/ un nem-
mees drohfschu Prahtu preeksch
muhsfeimLanđim/un preeksch teem
Pilsfahteem muhsa Deewa/ bet
tas KUNGS lai darra/ ka tam
labbi patihk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joabs nahze tuwaki
ar Jaweem Łandim/ kas pee wi-
na bija/ ar teem Sihrexeem kau-
tees/bet tee behdse preeksch winna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee Ammona Behr-
ni to redseja/ ka tee Sihrexi beh-
dse/tad behdse tee arridsan preeksch
Abisaja/ un nahze Pilsfahta/ un
Joabs atgreeehs no teem Am-
mona Behrneem/ un nahze uhs
Jerusałmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu tee Sihrexi re-
dseja/ ka tee Israëta Preekschá
bija kauti/ tad fapulzejahs tee
atkak.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Adad-Esers fuhttja/
un tikte tohs Sihretus nahkt/
kas winnpufs Uppes bija/ un tee
nahze uhs Eelannu/ un Sobaks
Adad-Esersa KarraLeels-Kungs/
gahje winnu Preekscha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad tas Dahwidam tap-
pe pafazzihte/ tad fapulzinaja
wiꞥsch winnu Israëlu/ un gahje
pahr to Jardann/ un nahze uhs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee Sihrexi behdse
preeksch Israëta/ un Dahwide
okawe no teem Sihrexeem tep-
tinfints Rattus/ un tfchettrdef-
mits tuhkstoschus Jahtneekus/
wiꞥsch kawe arridsan Sobaku
winno Karra Leel-Kungu/ ka
wiꞥsch tur nomirre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu wiꞥſt Kehnini/ kas
Adad-Esersa Kalpi bija/ redseja/
ka tee Israëta Preekschá kauti
bija/ tad darrija tee Meern ar I-
sraëlu/ un kalpoja winnam/ un
tee Sihrexi bihjajahs teem Am-
mona Behrneem wairs Paliga
nahkt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XI. Nodalla.
Dahwids apmett Lehgeri ap Rabbu: r. Pahr-
kahpj to Lauhibu ar Batsebas: z/ 4. Leek
winnas Wihru to Uriafu Karra apkant: 14.
Un apnem to jew par Seewu: 17.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N kad tas Gads bija
vagahjis/ ap to Laiku/
kad tee Kehnini tseet/
tad fuhtija Dahwids Joabu un
winna Kalpus ar winnu/ un wi-
nas Israëln/ ka teem bij tohs Am-
mona Behrnus mattaht/ un prett
Rabbu apnestees: Bet Dahwids
palieke Jerusałme.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ap Wakara Laikn zeh-
lehs Dahwids no jawas Gultas/
un gabje us ta Kehnixa Nam-
ma Jumtu/ un redseja no ta
Jumta weenu Seewu ter mas-
gajam/ un scht Seewa bija toh-
ti skafta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids nosuhttja/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
